name: eidos-skills-hub
description: Real-time search across 20K+ agent skills from skills.sh plus Eidos first-party hubs (contracts, transcoders, Storemetheus).

interface.shortDescription: Search 20K+ agent skills and the Eidos ecosystem.
interface.longDescription: Eidos Skills Hub is the search layer for the Eidos agent skills ecosystem. It indexes skills.sh (20K+ community skills) and all Eidos first-party hubs — contracts, transcoders, and Storemetheus plugin stores — and serves them through a single search surface. Use it to find, read, and install agent skills from any source.
defaultPrompt: Search for skills related to my current task.
Find the best skill for working with Supabase.
Show me what Eidos ecosystem skills are available.
